aggregation.family_statistic: within each mandatory stratum, maximum root-mean-square objective distance; selection tests every stratum row against one familywise threshold calibrated as the maximum over all objectives and all six strata
aggregation.generated_station_weights: equal within each frozen Daymet contributor stratum
aggregation.observed_station_weights: 0.5 for each of the two frozen USCRN development stations per stratum
aggregation.station_pairing: unpaired group-to-group comparison; no Daymet-to-USCRN station identity mapping is asserted

boundary_rule: candidate_minus_faithful greater than the frozen threshold is material degradation; equality is non-degradation
construct_status: amended exploratory grouped construct; not confirmatory evidence for the original A9a site-season distances
distance: root-mean-square componentwise difference between equal-weight generated and observed group vectors after division by the candidate-blind station-year bootstrap component scale
finite_and_unavailable_rule: no favorable zero and no imputation; an empty stratum, empty required transform, undefined rank correlation, or nonfinite component returns HOLD-A9C3-GROUP-ESTIMATOR

normalization.component_scale: bootstrap standard deviation of the first independent grouped estimate for the same horizon/stratum/objective/component
normalization.zero_baseline: the 0.02 component-scale lower bound applies, including log peak-ratio quantiles equal to zero

objectives.statistic: q10, median, and q90 of log duration minutes over all retained events within station; then equal-station mean

objectives.boundary_mass: values are clipped to [1e-6, 1-1e-6] before logit; clipping counts are disclosed by station and season
objectives.statistic: q10, median, and q90 of logit time-to-peak fraction over all retained events within station; then equal-station mean
q10, median, and q90 of log peak ratio after enforcing the registered support peak ratio >= 1; then equal-station mean

upper triangle of the six-variable Pearson correlation matrix on ranks of log1p depth, log duration, logit time-to-peak, log peak ratio, seasonal phase in [0,1), and log1p antecedent dry hours; then equal-station mean

resampling.block_boundary: retain each source event's antecedent dry-hour value computed in continuous source chronology; the first event in the complete source record is left-censored and omitted only from the joint-dependence vector; resampled block adjacency does not create or replace an antecedent gap
resampling.unit: complete Local Standard Time station-year within station; every event in a selected year is retained

season_rule: seasonal cells are not pass/fail units in A9c3; complete-record marginals are used and seasonal phase remains in the joint vector. Station-season counts and summaries remain mandatory diagnostics.
threshold: candidate-blind 95th-percentile higher-order statistic of the maximum root-mean-square standardized objective distance over all four objectives and six strata, separately for 30 and 100 years
